component.name: Devpad
component.summary: A C++/Qt6 code editor with syntax highlighting and embedded terminal

description.p: Devpad is a feature-rich code editor built with Qt6 and QScintilla. It provides:

ul.li: Multi-tab editing with syntax highlighting for 20+ languages
LSP integration (go-to-definition, references, rename, hover, completions, diagnostics)
Project panel with file tree and file type icons
Split view with drag-and-drop tab support
Find and Replace with regex support and Find in Files
Print and Print Preview with syntax highlighting
17 built-in themes with custom theme support
Session management and auto-save with backup/recovery

screenshot.caption: Devpad main window with C++ file open
